Tooltip_ScannerArmVF: A vehicle-mounted arm version of the spectroscope scanner used to acquire technology blueprints and data on living organisms.
Tooltip_ScannerArmVFExosuit: An arm for the Exosuit. A vehicle-mounted arm version of the spectroscope scanner used to acquire technology blueprints and data on living organisms.
Tooltip_ScannerArmFragment: A Scannable fragment of the Scanner Arm.
